$comment: c15b shipped <errno.h> on macOS — the proof of the c15a per-target const/macro variant extension. The `errno` macro selects (*__error()) on macho (libSystem) via the per-format MACRO variant; EAGAIN=35 is the Darwin value via the per-format CONSTANT variant (Linux is 11). Single arm64-macho target → runs on the macos-latest CI leg (native Apple Silicon, runs Mach-O). exit 42 iff both per-format selections are correct. RED-ON-DISABLE: a broken variant selector hands macho the elf values (__errno_location → link fails; EAGAIN 11 → exit 1). Release arm runs the optimizer over the macro-expanded call.
